title: Compare A2A agent card schema (.well-known/agent-card.json) with SEP-2127 Server Card. Evaluate dual-format generation: one Build() call producing both formats. Reference: https://a2a-protocol.org/latest/specification/ and existing servercard/attach.go
close_reason: Closed 26-04-2026 as not-now. User judged A2A protocol spec (a2a-protocol.org) not mature enough to invest in dual-format generation. SEP-2127 Server Card is the live target; A2A is in active spec churn. Re-open when A2A reaches a stable major version OR when a downstream consumer asks for A2A-format output.
